chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Rev. App. No. D – 03 of 2023 Cr. Jail Appeal No. S – 03 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Cr. Rev. App. No. D-03 of 2023 Hearing of main case Cr. Jail Appeal No. S-03 of 2023 For hearing of case 16.05.2024 Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Jatoi, Additional Prosecutor General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Cr. Rev. App. No. D-03 of 2023: On the last date of hearing, applicant / complainant Mst. Zeenat Khatoon was present and had sought time to bring her counsel. She has filed this revision application for enhancement of sentence against respondents awarded to them in Sessions Case No.106/2019 (Re: The State versus Muhammad Ali Kurio and another) by learned Additional Sessions Judge-IV (Gender Based Violence Court), Khairpur vide judgment dated 26.12.2022, for attempting to commit rape with her. On 22.03.2023, this fact was noted by this Court, and confronted to the Counsel for complainant to justify filing of revision application, he had sought time. Be that as it may, since no one is present in this revision application today, the same is dismissed in non-prosecution. Cr. Jail Appeal No. S-03 of 2023: The jail appeal being SB matter is transmitted to Single Bench with direction to the office to fix the same after three weeks, for which intimation notice be issued to the counsel for appellants. Office is directed to place a signed copy of this order in the captioned connected matter. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
